CDPR. Fix. Your. Game. I don't want use Windows because common reasons (Annoying Updates, BSOD, Malware/Virus, etc.) but this should don't mean as "you can't play this game". Anyways, broken after 1.62 update.

notes: I don't know what's wrong with all those positive reviews on this website, as this game is simply unplayable on Deck. Do I have a different Steam Deck than other people? No matter what I try with this game (experimental Proton, low settings, or lower resolution), it sometimes crashes even before I make it to the main menu. Then, it certainly crashes around 5 minutes into gameplay. Sometimes you can manually shut it down when it crashes, but most of the time, the Deck just reboots and turns into a black screen where you can do nothing about it.The problem is that whenever the game drops its FPS (even by 1 frame) and flickers, the Deck can't handle it and crashes. It is way too unstable and unplayable !

notes:
When creating a new game, the game will freeze at a black screen and never recover, although music still plays in the background. The character creator works but will freeze when entering the game.

Interestingly, during the initial freeze and when killing the process, the whole system freezes for about 5 seconds.

This is using Lutris as I own it through GOG. I have tried the following wine versions:
* lutris-7.2.2 (does not get to menu)
* lutrist-GE=Proton8-15
* lutrist-GE=Proton8-16

The game runs fine in the menu, changing various settings does not help as the game still freezes.

Also, as others have noted, the game uses controller icons everywere even though none is connected (using kbm).
title: Cyberpunk 2077

title: Cyberpunk 2077

notes:
Tried a lot of stuff: 
- using different proton runtime config options (obv. including setting none)
- different proton version (7, 8, experimental and latest GEProton)
- different graphics settings 
- and even the "beta" 1.6 version of the game (great btw that one has to download nearly the whole game anew when changing between these versions...). 

I had no real crash but graphics glitches that make everything unusable. Sometimes the settings menu is greyed out or partly invisible, sometimes already when opening it, sometimes only after some time scrolling through the options. Sometimes whole screen fills with artifacts (like the screen repeats in multiple small windows but mostly black). 

I maybe finished running the benchmark once without glitches in many hours of trying. When trying to really start a new game character creation is impossible since random parts of the options or the characters are invisible. Sound works fine, though.

In short, absolutely 0% playable.
title: Cyberpunk 2077
